reasons: Belerick directly punishes repeated basic attacks, which are central to Irithel's damage.
His taunt can force Irithel into bad attack patterns if she is too close.

proof.summary: Irithel relies on repeated ranged basic attacks, while Belerick can retaliate when damaged and disrupt her free-hit window with taunt.
worksBestWhen: Belerick builds durable and positions between Irithel and allied backline.
Belerick forces Irithel to hit him during her damage window.
failureCases: Irithel keeps maximum distance and Belerick cannot reach her.
Belerick is ignored while Irithel attacks safer targets.

reasons: Lolita can reduce Irithel's ranged basic attack value by blocking incoming ranged basic attacks and projectiles.
This is especially useful in front-to-back teamfights.

proof.summary: Irithel wants to output continuous ranged attacks, while Lolita can block ranged basic attacks and projectiles during the damage window.
worksBestWhen: Lolita faces Irithel during Heavy Crossbow.
Lolita protects the damage dealer behind her.
failureCases: Irithel waits for Lolita's shield to expire before committing.

reasons: Natalia can threaten Irithel from camouflage before Irithel has space to kite.
Silence and backline pressure make it harder for Irithel to freely reposition.

proof.summary: Irithel is dangerous when she sees the fight early and kites forward, while Natalia can attack from camouflage and force Irithel to play with vision discipline.
worksBestWhen: Natalia targets Irithel before teamfight formation is complete.
failureCases: Irithel's team provides reveal or peel.
Irithel stays grouped around her frontline.

reasons: Saber can punish Irithel's lack of hard defensive tools with targeted airborne burst.
This is strong when Irithel is separated from peel.

proof.summary: Irithel wants space to kite, while Saber can bypass spacing with targeted airborne burst.
worksBestWhen: Saber attacks after Irithel's frontline has used peel.
Irithel is isolated from support protection.
failureCases: Irithel has Purify, defensive item timing, or reliable tank protection.
Saber commits while Irithel's team is ready to counter-engage.

reasons: Kaja can isolate Irithel and deny her ability to kite during the suppression window.
This works best when Kaja has follow-up damage nearby.

proof.summary: Irithel's safety depends on spacing and movement, while Kaja can suppress and drag her out of position.
worksBestWhen: Kaja has Flicker or flank access.
Teammates are ready to burst Irithel during the drag.
failureCases: Kaja wastes Divine Judgment on a tank instead of Irithel.
